title: Fig. 48 in Phylogeny Of Phyllostomid Bats (Mammalia: Chiroptera): Data From Diverse Morphological Systems, Sex Chromosomes, And Restriction Sites
author: WETTERER, ANDREA L.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 48. Results of a heuristic search of 12 restriction site characters for 44 taxa. The tree shown here is a strict consensus of 120 most parsimonious trees, each of 17 steps (CI = 0.706, RI = 0.917).
steps_raw: Fig. 48. Results of a heuristic search of 12 restriction site characters for 44 taxa. The tree shown here is a strict consensus of 120 most parsimonious trees, each of 17 steps (CI = 0.706, RI = 0.917).
